# ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.ContentProtectionKey.Hdr

**Object**

Headers to include with requests to the content protection key endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
object ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.ContentProtectionKey.Hdr
```

## Discussion

A dictionary that contains the header names and their values.

## Requiring Headers

- **ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.ContentProtectionKey.Cks**: Configuration details for your service’s content protection system.
